reasoning: Bad Bunny was the most streamed artist on Spotify from 2020 to 2022, but Taylor Swift took the title in 2023 and 2024. Swift's catalogue daily streams are immensely high, and with The Weeknd, Bruno Mars, and Taylor Swift dominating the platform in 2025, Bad Bunny is highly unlikely to reclaim the top spot without a massive and culturally dominant 2025 album release — which he does not appear to have. Reports consistently point to Taylor Swift and The Weeknd as the main contenders for 2025. Therefore, the probability of Bad Bunny finishing at #1 for the year is very low.
